metadata.name: Request a Quote from Multiple Suppliers

description: A buyer is sourcing a new component and needs to send a Request for Quote (RFQ) to several potential suppliers.

nodes.task_description: Define the RFQ, including the part specifications, required quantity, and response deadline.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a new RFQ with all necessary details.

nodes.task_description: Select a list of qualified suppliers to receive the RFQ.

expected_outcome.value: Agent selects three qualified suppliers from the SRM system.

nodes.task_description: Send the RFQ to the selected suppliers.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully dispatches the RFQ to all three suppliers.
